[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up of large black letters on a white background, partially cropped. The main visual focus is the text reading “ga” on the upper left and “espek” on the lower left. The setting is a simple, plain white background with no other visible elements, and the camera appears tightly cropped so only parts of the lettering are visible. The text is set in a bold, lowercase, sans-serif style, with black letters and no visible outline or decoration. No important visible text detected beyond the partial letters “ga” and “espek,” which appear as part of a larger word or phrase.

Practical Summary: This image is a cropped typographic view showing the letters “ga” and “espek.” It contains no other objects or visible context besides the partial text on a white background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

ga  
espeк  

# Structured Version

- ga  
- espeк  

# Notes

- The last character in “espeк” appears to be a Cyrillic “к” (k), not a Latin “k”.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar ini berisi teks "ga espek" yang ditulis dalam font sans-serif hitam dengan latar belakang putih. Teks tersebut tampak sedikit buram. Tidak ada konten NSFW, pornografi, atau ketelanjangan dalam gambar ini.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
